fields.display_text: Learn how things grow and stay alive
Be the leader in a group
Care about people and their problems
Drive or ride in a vehicle
Moving away for school, then returning
Visual: learns best by seeing and looking at information.
Auditory: learns best by listening and hearing information.
Reading/writing: learns best by reading and writing information
Kinaesthetic: learns best by doing and experiencing things.
